rule CDB_CVE20264838__SourceCodester_Malawi_Onlin {

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-4838 - SourceCodester Malawi Online Market display.php sql injection"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4838" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SourceCodester" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
